documents.title: Arahan Teknik (Jalan) 2B/85 (Pindaan 2019): Design and Application of Traffic Signs

documents.title: China GB 5768 Road Traffic Signs - Wikimedia Commons Reference Files
documents.notes: Used for assignment signs that visually match Mainland China / GB-style road-sign artwork rather than Malaysian JKR artwork. Per-file metadata is tracked in stage_c_china_reference_sources_01.csv.
